titleStmt.title: SII 40.318: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 318. (A.R. No. B. 366 of 1933.) Kōḍūru, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying near the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1479, Piṅgaḷa, Mārgaśira, ba. 11, Thursday, corresponding to 1557 A.D., December 16.

Records the gift of land and money to the temple Chennakēśavarāya at Kōḍuru, on the bank of the (river) Pennā in the Jagatāpi Gutti-śīma by Śēshādri-Nāyaka, son of Yēnugula Timmi-Nāyaka, the agent of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Tirumalarājadēva-Mahārāja of the Sōmavaṁśa and the Ātrēya-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
va¨rṣaṁbbulu 1479 Agunēṭi piṁgaḷa saṁ
vatsara mā¨rgaśira ba 11 gu śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ
śrīmatu catu¨rbhuvanādhīśvarulaina Anēkakōṭi brahmāṁḍanāyakulaina
kōḍūri caṁnakēśavarāyani divyaśrīpādapadmaṁbula
svāmigānuṁḍu sōmavaṁśa Ātrēyagōtrōdbhavulaina
śrī¨rmamahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju tiru
malarājayadēva mahārājulayyavāri
kāryaka¨rtalayina yēnugula timināya
ni kumāruṁḍu śēṣādrināyaniṁgāru vēyiṁci
na bhūdāna dha¨rmaśāsana kramameṭlaṁnanu śrīma
drājādhirājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivadēva
rāya mahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanā
sīnuṁḍai pṛthivī sāmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgā sa ti
rumalarājayyavāri nāyaṁkārānaku pāliṁcina ya
navadhariṁcina jagatāpi guttiśīmaku cēri penadharini kōḍūri
grāmāna Amarayya cēniki Uttaraṁ piṁccakaladiṁnna polame
ramōyanuvrālu saumya saṁvatsarāna mārevāṭi timmayya
dhāravośi dānapatraṁ Iccina pumāṇasanu
māḷalekha 72 lakṣmīdēvaṁ lekha 1 vubhayaṁ
cekha 472 Akṣarālā nālgupuṭlu panidumu
cenu koIlatirugu dārapāleṁ vallavaccina ro
khamuṁnu tirumalarājayyavāri nirūpakramānaṁ
pāḷeṁkāṁpulu maggaṁ 1084 lekhānu Aṁgaḍiṁki
mōdalekhānureḍi dānyadhāravosi yistimi nagari
paṁnu Aṁnālu Aviṭimaḍi Asaleccaṁguti
vecvālu yelimaḍilena
¨rvamānyaṁ gānu yiccina dha¨rmma
śāsanaṁ . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānapālanaṁ pa
ra śāsanaṁ
lenuhārana
bōvuduru gōbrāhmaṇa
lōna pāpaṁ sesina ru
dha¨rmmaśāsanāṁku yavvaru tappate
Digital edition of SII 40.318 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
